title: dryopteris poecilophlebia
intro: Dryopteris poecilophlebia, also known as the Japanese wood fern, is a species of fern found in East Asia. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris poecilophlebia lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its rich content of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Dryopteris poecilophlebia can be prepared as herbal teas or infusions, as well as being dried and used in traditional medicine or modern supplements.
